name: palserver-gui
description: Docker-based Palworld dedicated server management. Agent daemon + remote Web UI.
author: Dalufishe

scripts.bundle:agent: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @palserver/agent build && node scripts/bundle-agent.mjs
scripts.release:exe: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @palserver/web build && pnpm bundle:agent && node scripts/build-sea.mjs
